testcase.name: 0160-non-participating-aspects-testcase
Non-participating Aspects Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case for under-specified tables.

variation.name: Table with non-participating explicit dimension aspect
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (dimension D = d1, d2), and two rows (primary items m1, m2). The instance contains facts reported against different values of dimension E, but the table specifies no values for E, so only facts with the default value (E = e0) are included.

variation.name: Table with non-participating typed dimension aspect
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (dimension D = d1, d2), and two rows (primary items m1, m2). The instance contains facts reported against different values of typed dimension T, but the table specifies no values for T, so only facts that are not reported against dimension T are included.

variation.name: Table with non-participating period aspect
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (dimension D = d1, d2), and two rows (primary items m1, m2). The instance contains facts reported for different periods, but the table specifies no periods, so each cell contains several facts with different periods.
